name: Saumya Mehta
subTagline: CS Honours, Carleton University · Open to Junior Roles in Ottawa & Remote
summary: I'm a Computer Science graduate from Carleton University building at the intersection of full-stack development and applied AI — currently focused on roles where those two things overlap. I ship, I iterate, and I get better fast. Based in Ottawa, ON · Open to on-site, hybrid, and remote · Willing to relocate anywhere in Canada.
